author: sergeevii123
name: Loss Reweight (predictability-weighted CE) on 3-Layer Recurrence + Parallel Residuals base
technique_summary: Predictability-weighted per-token CE on top of PR #1413 base. Per-token NLL rescaled by clipped, mean-1-normalized ratio of own NLL to batch-mean NLL, raised to alpha (warmup-ramped). Bit-identical to base when LOSS_REWEIGHT_ALPHA=0.
base: PR #1413 (2026-04-09): SP8192 + 3-Layer Recurrence + Parallel Residuals + QK-Gain 5.25 + Legal TTT, 3-seed val_bpb 1.0810

prior_negative_results.PR_1360: Gaussian per-token NLL reweight on PR #180 base — +0.014 bpb (worse). Diagnosis: reshaped train objective ≠ BPB metric.
